_readme: Edit this file to update any text on the website without touching code. Re-run `npm run build` after saving changes.

site.name: Yan BTY
site.description: Morocco's premium multi-brand beauty destination. Where every beauty lover can discover established icons and future favourites.

promoBar: Free shipping on orders over 500 MAD · Loyalty Points on every order

homepage.heroSubtitle: Morocco's premium multi-brand beauty destination. Discover established icons and future favourites.
homepage.yanOneBody: Crafted in Morocco with a global perspective. Every formula is clean, inclusive, and beautifully effective — designed for every skin, inspired by every journey.
homepage.profileBody: Tell us your skin type, concerns, and preferences — we'll surface products that are truly "Good For You" and build your ideal routine.
homepage.loyaltyBody: Earn points with every purchase and review. Redeem for exclusive rewards and early access to new launches.

header.freeShippingText: Free shipping on orders over {amount} MAD

footer.brandDescription: Morocco's premium multi-brand beauty destination. Where every beauty lover can discover established icons and future favourites.

stores.name: Yan BTY Morocco Mall
stores.address: Morocco Mall, Bd de la Corniche, Casablanca

terms: Physical gift cards and sets are delivered within 2–3 working days to any address in Morocco.
Valid in all Yan BTY stores and at yanbty.ma. Gift cards do not expire.
Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash. Partial redemption leaves balance on the card.
Category gift set contents may vary seasonally. Substitutions are of equivalent value.
Lost or stolen cards cannot be replaced without proof of purchase.

seo.defaultDescription: Morocco's premium multi-brand beauty destination. Discover makeup, skincare, fragrance and more from the world's finest brands alongside Yan&One, our signature collection.
